$comment: Enumerates the config methods (how an operator applies a config to a gateway) and the packet forwarders (the config format), plus the legal {{TOKEN}} set for each forwarder. The conformance suite and src/lint.ts enforce that a template uses only tokens declared here, and that every rendered output leaves no token unfilled. Token `source` says where renderConfig's caller gets the value: `connection` = from the ChirpStack connection params the operator supplies; `region` = merged from definitions/regions/<id>.json by configScript/renderRadioBlock. `required` tokens must resolve to a value; tokens with a `default` are filled with it when the caller omits them.

web-ui.name: Vendor web admin UI
web-ui.description: Log in to the gateway's web interface and set the packet-forwarder fields by hand. The gateway.json config.<method>.path names the menu location.

forwarder-file.name: Packet-forwarder config file
forwarder-file.description: Write the rendered config to the packet forwarder's config file on the gateway (SSH/SFTP or the web UI's file upload). The gateway.json config.<forwarder>.forwarderFilePath names the on-box path.

ssh-cli.name: SSH / CLI
ssh-cli.description: Apply the config over an SSH or vendor CLI session (e.g. RouterOS, Kerlink CLI).

semtech-udp.name: Semtech UDP packet forwarder
semtech-udp.description: The classic Semtech UDP protocol (lora_pkt_fwd / SX1302 HAL packet forwarder). Reads a global_conf.json. Point it at the ChirpStack Gateway Bridge UDP backend (default port 1700).
semtech-udp.target: ChirpStack Gateway Bridge — Semtech UDP backend (UDP, default port 1700)

SERVER_ADDRESS.description: Hostname or IP of the ChirpStack Gateway Bridge.

SERVER_PORT_UP.description: Uplink UDP port on the Gateway Bridge.

SERVER_PORT_DOWN.description: Downlink UDP port on the Gateway Bridge.

RADIO_0_FREQ.description: Center frequency (Hz) of radio 0 for the region channel plan.

RADIO_1_FREQ.description: Center frequency (Hz) of radio 1 for the region channel plan.

RADIO_BLOCK.description: The chan_multiSF_0..7 / chan_Lora_std / chan_FSK channel definitions serialized from the region channel plan (see renderRadioBlock).

basics-station.name: LoRa Basics Station
basics-station.description: Semtech's Basics Station forwarder. Reads a station.conf plus tc.uri / tc.trust files. Point tc.uri at the ChirpStack Gateway Bridge Basics Station backend (WebSocket, commonly wss on port 3001).
basics-station.target: ChirpStack Gateway Bridge — Basics Station backend (WebSocket, commonly wss://<host>:3001)

TC_URI.description: LNS WebSocket URI, e.g. wss://<host>:3001. Written to the gateway's tc.uri file.

TRUST_CERT.description: Path/name of the CA trust PEM on the gateway (tc.trust). Use the LNS CA; a self-signed dev CA is acceptable on a private bench.

RADIO_0_FREQ.description: Center frequency (Hz) of radio 0 for the region channel plan.

RADIO_1_FREQ.description: Center frequency (Hz) of radio 1 for the region channel plan.

RADIO_BLOCK.description: The chan_multiSF_0..7 / chan_Lora_std / chan_FSK channel definitions serialized from the region channel plan (see renderRadioBlock).

CUPS_URI.description: Optional CUPS URI (wss://<host>:3002) when the gateway is provisioned via CUPS instead of a static tc.uri.

TC_KEY.description: Optional Authorization token written to the gateway's tc.key file.
